name: crocalor
flavor_texts: The combination of Crocalor’s fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on the Pokémon’s head.
The valve in Crocalor’s flame sac is closely connected to its vocal cords. This Pokémon utters a guttural cry as it spews flames every which way.
text: Crocalor is the Fire Croc Pokémon. It is a fire-type Pokémon. Abilities: blaze, unaware (hidden). Base stats — HP: 81, Attack: 55, Defense: 78, Sp. Atk: 90, Sp. Def: 58, Speed: 49. Evolution line: fuecoco → crocalor → skeledirge. Lore: The combination of Crocalor’s fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on the Pokémon’s head. The valve in Crocalor’s flame sac is closely connected to its vocal cords. This Pokémon utters a guttural cry as it spews flames every which way.
